question: Which EV supply chain roles in Georgia have only one supplier, making them a single point of failure?
answer:
Georgia has 25 EV supply chain roles served by only ONE company (single points of failure):

• GSC Steel Stamping LLC [Tier 2/3] — sole supplier for: Power Electronics
• Morgan Corp. [Tier 1] — sole supplier for: Charging Infrastructure
• Tie Down Engineering [OEM (Footprint)] — sole supplier for: OEM corporate and engineering footprint (electrification)
• TN Americas Holding Inc. [OEM (Footprint)] — sole supplier for: OEM parent group footprint (EV + HD electrification)
• Toyota Industries Group (TACG-TICA) [OEM (Footprint)] — sole supplier for: OEM parent group footprint (electric truck strategy)
• Trenton Pressing [OEM (Footprint)] — sole supplier for: OEM corporate footprint and supplier integration
• Trenton Pressing Inc. [OEM Supply Chain] — sole supplier for: Machined components supporting EV and ICE vehicles
• Valeo [OEM Supply Chain] — sole supplier for: Tier 1 automotive components
• Vanguard National Trailer Corp. [OEM Supply Chain] — sole supplier for: Body and chassis components for EV and ICE OEMs
• Vernay [OEM Supply Chain] — sole supplier for: Stamped and welded assemblies for OEMs
• Vista Metals Corp. [OEM Supply Chain] — sole supplier for: EV and ICE component manufacturing
• Voestalpine Automotive Body Parts Inc. [OEM Supply Chain] — sole supplier for: EV and ICE powertrain and HVAC components
• Volvo Cars USA [OEM Supply Chain] — sole supplier for: Plastic components for EV and ICE vehicles
• Volvo Group North America [OEM Supply Chain] — sole supplier for: Stamped metal components for OEMs
• Wabash National Corp. [OEM Supply Chain] — sole supplier for: Interior and exterior plastic parts
• Wheelabrator Group Inc. [OEM Supply Chain] — sole supplier for: Interior trim and textile components
• WIKA USA [OEM Supply Chain] — sole supplier for: HV and LV wiring harnesses for EVs and ICE vehicles
• Woodbridge Foam Corp. [OEM Supply Chain] — sole supplier for: EV wiring harnesses and power distribution
• Woory Industrial Co. [OEM Supply Chain] — sole supplier for: High‑voltage EV connectors and electronics
• Yachiyo Manufacturing of America LLC [OEM Supply Chain] — sole supplier for: EV electrical distribution and interior systems
• Yamaha Motor Manufacturing Corp. [OEM Supply Chain] — sole supplier for: Advanced electrical architecture for EVs
• Yazaki North America [OEM Footprint] — sole supplier for: Power electronics, sensors, and EV systems
• YKK USA Inc. [OEM Footprint] — sole supplier for: EV sensors, braking, and control systems
• TI Fluid Systems [OEM] — sole supplier for: Vehicle safety systems OEM (EV + ICE)
• ZF Gainesville LLC [OEM Supply Chain] — sole supplier for: EV thermal management and power electronics
